admin_settings.partner_logo_hint: Shown in the footer left slot. PNG, JPEG, WebP or SVG — max 2 MB.
admin_settings.header_colors_desc: Choose the colour of the accessible (GOV.UK-style) site header. Leave unset to keep the standard black header with the blue line.
admin_settings.header_bg_color_hint: The main header bar. Use a strong, dark brand colour so the white text stays readable.
admin_settings.header_accent_color_hint: The thin line under the header. Leave blank to match the background (no visible line), or pick a contrasting colour such as white.
admin_settings.header_logo_desc: Upload a custom logo to show in the site header instead of your community's initials. Leave empty to use the default.
admin_settings.header_logo_hint: Used for light backgrounds. PNG, JPEG, WebP or SVG — max 2 MB.
admin_settings.header_logo_dark_hint: Optional. Shown when the viewer uses dark mode. If omitted, the light logo is used everywhere.

operations.title: Operations
operations.description: Cache statistics and background job controls.

retention.page_subtitle: Configure how long operational data is kept before automatic disposal. Disabled policies retain data indefinitely.
retention.policies_intro: Enable a policy and set its retention window ({{min}}–{{max}} days). Data older than the window is deleted by the nightly enforcement run, and every disposal is logged below.
retention.no_runs: No disposal runs yet. Runs appear here after the nightly enforcement has processed an enabled policy.
retention.type_activity_log_desc: Member and system activity trail (logins, record changes).
retention.type_notifications_desc: In-app bell notifications delivered to members.
retention.type_login_attempts_desc: Successful and failed sign-in attempt records.

seed_generator.warning_body: Only run seed generation in development or test environments. It creates sample records and may affect reports.

sso.page_subtitle: Configure OpenID Connect identity providers for this community
sso.intro: Members sign in through your organisation's identity provider using OpenID Connect. A button appears on the login and registration pages for each enabled provider.
sso.preset_entra_hint: For Microsoft Entra ID, the issuer URL is https://login.microsoftonline.com/{directory-tenant-id}/v2.0
sso.delete_body: Delete "{{name}}"? Members will no longer be able to sign in with this provider.
sso.key_invalid: Provider key must be 2–20 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens or underscores, starting with a letter or number.
sso.field_key_desc: Short unique identifier used in URLs (e.g. coventry). Cannot be changed later.
sso.field_display_name_desc: Shown on the sign-in button, e.g. "Sign in with Coventry City Council".
sso.field_issuer_url_desc: The OIDC issuer; discovery runs against {issuer}/.well-known/openid-configuration.
sso.secret_keep_placeholder: Leave blank to keep the current secret
sso.secret_keep_desc: A secret is stored. Enter a new value to replace it, or leave blank to keep it.
sso.field_scopes_desc: Space-separated OIDC scopes. Default: openid profile email
sso.field_domains_desc: Comma-separated, e.g. coventry.gov.uk, example.org. Leave empty to allow any domain.
sso.field_auto_provision_desc: Automatically create a member account on first sign-in. When off, only existing members can sign in with SSO.
sso.field_enabled_desc: Show this provider on the login and registration pages.

system.activity_log_desc: View a log of all admin actions taken on this platform
system.additional_configuration_desc: Localization, wallet, content moderation, notifications, and limits. These settings save independently from the form above.
system.blog_restore_desc: Restore blog posts from automatic backups

registration_breaker.title: Registration Security
registration_breaker.description: Automatic pause when this community gets an unusual flood of signups in one hour.
registration_breaker.paused_body: The hourly signup threshold ({{threshold}} new accounts) was exceeded. Registration will auto-resume in about {{minutes}} minutes, or you can resume it now. Check Sentry / logs for the source IPs before clearing if you suspect an attack.
registration_breaker.threshold_prefix: Threshold is configured at the platform level via
registration_breaker.threshold_suffix: When tripped, this banner turns red and a one-click resume button appears here.

system.cron_job_setup_desc: Set up cron jobs to run on a custom schedule

system.with_absolute_project_path: with the absolute path to your project.

system.desc_apple_push_notification_service_key: Apple Push Notification Service (APNs) private key for iOS push notifications
system.desc_blog_post_backups_will_appear_here_: Blog post backups will appear here when auto-backup is enabled
system.desc_codes_expire_at_midnight_on_this_da: Codes expire at midnight on this date. Leave empty for no expiry.
system.desc_cron_expression_leave_empty_to_use_: Cron expression for custom schedule. Leave empty to use the default.
system.desc_displayed_in_the_site_footer_and_le: Displayed in the site footer and on legal/about pages
system.desc_fallback_email_for_job_failure_noti: Fallback email address for job failure notifications if no notification email is set
system.desc_firebase_cloud_messaging_server_key: Firebase Cloud Messaging server key for Android push notifications
system.desc_how_long_to_keep_job_execution_logs: How long to keep job execution logs before automatic deletion
system.desc_internal_note_to_help_you_remember_: Internal note to help you remember what this credential is for
system.desc_maximum_execution_time: Maximum time in seconds a job is allowed to run before being killed
system.desc_maximum_number_of_jobs_that_can_run: Maximum number of jobs that can run simultaneously
system.desc_number_of_times_to_retry_failed_job: Number of times to retry failed jobs before giving up
system.desc_used_to_verify_incoming_webhook_pay: Used to verify the authenticity of incoming webhook payloads

system.failed_to_save_credentials_please_check: Failed to save credentials. Please check your input and try again.

system.image_settings_desc: Configure image upload settings including formats, resizing, and WebP conversion
system.jobs_failed_24h_message: Jobs failed in the last 24 hours

native_app.description: Configure PWA, push, and tenant-branded mobile app build readiness
native_app.enable_push_notifications_desc: Route FCM/APNs notifications through the configured mobile app channel.

requirements.android_identity: Add Android package name and Play Store ID.
requirements.ios_identity: Add iOS bundle ID and App Store ID.
requirements.push_routing: Enable push and add sender/channel routing values.
requirements.store_metadata: Add marketing, privacy, and support URLs.

native_app.service_worker_desc: Enable offline shell and app caching.

onboarding.country_preset_desc: Apply a country preset to pre-fill registration policy settings
onboarding.custom_text_desc: Custom text to display to members during this onboarding step
onboarding.help_text_desc: Help text shown below the input during this onboarding step
onboarding.legal_notice_desc: Legal notice text shown to members during this onboarding step
onboarding.listing_creation_desc: Configure when and how new listings are published during onboarding
onboarding.listing_mode_active_desc: New listings are published immediately as active
onboarding.listing_mode_disabled_desc: Members cannot create listings during onboarding
onboarding.listing_mode_draft_desc: New listings are saved as drafts for admin review
onboarding.listing_mode_pending_desc: New listings are held as pending until approved by an admin
onboarding.listing_mode_suggestions_desc: Members are shown suggested listing templates to choose from
onboarding.max_auto_listings_desc: Maximum number of listings that can be auto-created during onboarding
onboarding.min_bio_length_desc: Minimum number of characters required in the member bio
onboarding.module_control_desc: Control which modules are available during the onboarding flow
onboarding.onboarding_enabled_desc: Enable or disable the guided onboarding flow for new members
onboarding.onboarding_mandatory_desc: Require new members to complete onboarding before accessing the platform
onboarding.page_description: Configure the onboarding flow for new members
onboarding.preset_already_exists: A preset with this name already exists
onboarding.preset_confirm: Are you sure you want to apply this preset? It will overwrite current settings.
onboarding.preset_note: Applying a preset will overwrite your current registration policy settings
onboarding.profile_requirements_desc: Set the minimum profile requirements members must complete
onboarding.require_avatar_visibility_desc: Require members to set their avatar visibility preference
onboarding.require_bio_desc: Require members to fill in their bio before continuing
onboarding.require_bio_visibility_desc: Require members to set their bio visibility preference
onboarding.require_completion_desc: Require members to fully complete this step before proceeding
onboarding.require_photo_desc: Require members to upload a profile photo before continuing
onboarding.safeguarding_config_desc: Configure safeguarding questions and options shown during onboarding
onboarding.safeguarding_intro_desc: Introductory text explaining safeguarding to new members
onboarding.step_configuration_desc: Configure the steps shown in the onboarding wizard
onboarding.step_confirm_desc: Final confirmation step where members review and submit their profile
onboarding.step_interests_desc: Step where members choose their interests and categories
onboarding.step_profile_desc: Step where members fill in their profile information
onboarding.step_safeguarding_desc: Step where members complete safeguarding declarations
onboarding.step_skills_desc: Step where members add their skills and what they can offer
onboarding.step_welcome_desc: Welcome step introducing members to the platform
onboarding.visibility_gating_desc: Control what content members can see before completing onboarding
onboarding.welcome_text_desc: Welcome message shown to new members at the start of onboarding

reg.api_key_desc: API key for the selected identity verification provider
reg.credential_note: Keep these credentials secure. They provide access to identity verification services.
reg.credential_step_1: Step 1: Create an account with the identity provider
reg.credential_step_2: Step 2: Copy your API key from the provider dashboard
reg.credential_step_3: Step 3: Paste the API key above and click Save
reg.credential_step_4: Step 4: Test the connection to verify everything is working
reg.expiry_desc: Codes expire at midnight on this date. Leave empty for no expiry.
reg.fallback_admin_desc: Require admin approval after passing identity verification
reg.fallback_native_desc: Use the platform's native verification as a fallback
reg.fallback_none_desc: No fallback — the provider's decision is final
reg.generate_count_desc: Number of invite codes to generate in this batch
reg.generated_share: Share these codes with the people you want to invite
reg.info_gov_id: Registration requires a verified government ID
reg.info_invite: Registration requires a valid invite code
reg.info_open_approval: Anyone can register, but admin approval is required before access
reg.info_waitlist: Registrations are added to a waitlist for admin review
reg.invite_codes_desc: Generate and manage invite codes for controlled registration
reg.level_document_desc: Verify identity using a government-issued document
reg.level_document_selfie_desc: Verify identity using a document plus a live selfie
reg.level_manual_desc: Admin manually reviews and approves identity verification
reg.level_reusable_desc: Use an existing verified identity for re-registration
reg.max_uses_desc: Maximum number of times each invite code can be used (leave blank for unlimited)
reg.mode_gov_id_desc: Require government ID verification to register
reg.mode_invite_desc: Require an invite code to register
reg.mode_open_approval_desc: Anyone can register but must be approved by an admin
reg.mode_waitlist_desc: Registrations are added to a waitlist
reg.no_invite_codes_hint: No invite codes have been generated yet. Generate some above.
reg.no_providers_warning: No identity providers are configured. Add credentials above.
reg.note_desc: Internal note to help you remember what this credential is for
reg.page_description: Configure how new members can register on this platform
reg.post_activate_desc: What happens to a member's account immediately after they activate
reg.post_admin_approval_desc: What happens to a member's account after admin approval
reg.post_limited_desc: Member access is limited until further verification is completed
reg.post_reject_desc: What happens to a member's account if their application is rejected
reg.provider_credentials_desc: Enter API credentials for the selected identity verification provider
reg.registration_method_desc: Choose how new members can register on this platform
reg.require_email_desc: Require members to verify their email address before accessing the platform
reg.require_email_tooltip: Only platform super-admins may change this setting
reg.tip_change_modes: Changing the registration mode takes effect immediately for new registrations
reg.verification_settings_desc: Configure identity verification requirements for new member registrations
reg.waitlist_info: Members on the waitlist are approved manually by an admin
reg.webhook_desc: Used to verify the authenticity of incoming webhook payloads
reg.credentials_remove_confirm: Remove these credentials? This cannot be undone.

system.seed_generator_desc: Generate seed data for testing and development purposes
system.test_runner_desc: Run automated tests to verify platform functionality
system.webp_converter_desc: Convert uploaded images to WebP format for better performance
system.webp_converter_body: WebP images are typically 25-35% smaller than comparable JPEG or PNG files while maintaining similar quality. Running conversion will process all non-WebP images in the uploads directory.
system.desc_default_currency: Used for subscription and marketplace pricing
system.powered_by_branding_desc: Configure the footer's right-hand 'Powered By' slot. Changes take effect immediately. God-only.
system.desc_partner_logo_label: Short label shown above the partner logo (leave blank to use the default 'Community Partner' text)
system.desc_powered_by_label: Short label shown above the image (leave blank to use the default 'Powered by' text)
system.desc_powered_by_url: Makes the image clickable. Leave blank for no link.
system.label_powered_by_image_dark: Dark mode image (optional — falls back to light image if not set)
system.desc_open_registration: Allow anyone to register an account
system.desc_email_verification: Members must verify their email before accessing the platform
system.admin_approval_required_desc: New accounts must be approved by an admin before activation
system.super_admin_only_tooltip: Only platform super-admins may change this setting
system.try_filters_or_run_cron: Try adjusting your filters or run a cron job
system.clear_old_logs_warning: Logs executed before the chosen date will be permanently deleted.
system.failed_to_connect_cron_api: Failed to connect to cron API
system.auto_convert_webp_desc: Create WebP versions of supported uploads for smaller image downloads.
system.auto_resize_desc: Resize images that exceed the configured maximum dimensions.
system.desc_comma_separated_emails: Enter one or more email addresses separated by commas.
system.desc_job_will_run_when_enabled: This job will run on its configured schedule when enabled.
system.desc_notify_on_failure: Send an email notification when this job fails.
system.generate_thumbnails_desc: Generate smaller thumbnail variants for listings, profiles, and cards.
system.generated_data_for: Generated data for {{count}} selected data types
system.placeholder_footer_legal_text: e.g. Community Timebank CLG. Registered charity number and company number.
system.restore_blog_confirm: Restore blog posts from {{filename}}? This can overwrite current blog data.
system.strip_exif_desc: Remove EXIF metadata from uploaded images before storage.
system.partner_logo_link_url_description: Optional website link for the partner logo in the footer.
system.desc_inactivity_timeout: Automatically sign members out after this many minutes without activity. 0 disables the timeout; allowed range is 5–480 minutes. Recommended: 120.

verification.approve_confirm_prefix: Are you sure you want to
verification.approve_confirm_suffix: ? This will grant them verified status.
